purpose: Run a larger local qwen3.5 sweep over distinct Hadoop incidents so the rebuild line can evaluate worker-RPC, RM-channel, cleanup, and shuffle-pressure coverage under one strict contract before any paid API run.

Hadoop.alert_match: 2015-10-17 18:14:48,499 INFO [ContainerLauncher #4] org.apache.hadoop.ipc.Client: Retrying connect to server: MININT-FNANLI5.fareast.corp.microsoft.com/10.86.169.121:64642. Already tried 0 time(s); maxRetries=45
Hadoop.eligibility_note: Distinct worker-RPC retry incident. Tests whether the rebuilt worker-channel slot can stand outside the original 1445087491445_0002 proof case.

Hadoop.alert_match: 2015-10-18 21:39:41,390 INFO [RMCommunicator Allocator] org.apache.hadoop.ipc.Client: Retrying connect to server: msra-sa-41:8030. Already tried 0 time(s); retry policy is RetryUpToMaximumCountWithFixedSleep(maxRetries=10, sleepTime=1000 MILLISECONDS)
Hadoop.eligibility_note: Distinct RM-channel retry incident with explicit :8030 retry evidence and network-disconnection provenance.
Cleanup-heavy worker failure incident from a separate cluster window. Intended to test whether output-cleanup remains distinct from control-link retry and shuffle pressure.
Second cleanup incident retained to test non-duplicate cleanup coverage rather than relying on a single output-committer case.

Hadoop.alert_match: 2015-10-19 14:23:08,170 INFO [fetcher#5] org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.task.reduce.MergeManagerImpl: attempt_1445182159119_0001_m_000009_0: Shuffling to disk since 172334804 is greater than maxSingleShuffleLimit (35232152)
Hadoop.eligibility_note: Primary shuffle-pressure incident with disk-full provenance and no cleanup line in the selected alert.

Hadoop.alert_match: 2015-10-19 15:55:39,984 INFO [fetcher#1] org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.task.reduce.MergeManagerImpl: attempt_1445182159119_0014_m_000002_0: Shuffling to disk since 60514392 is greater than maxSingleShuffleLimit (32663142)
Hadoop.eligibility_note: Second shuffle-pressure incident used to test whether the storage-pressure slot generalizes beyond one disk-full case.
